name: dudu
description: Layered VC due-diligence skills: background-check (L1 cheap public-source) and pmf-signal (L2 deep claim ledger × verdict matrix), plus founder-check, market-context, competitive-landscape, market-sizing, and standalone customer-debrief.

interface.shortDescription: Layered VC due-diligence workflow with calibrated claim verification
interface.longDescription: Run layered diligence on a deal: Layer 1 background-check (founder + market context + competitive + sizing — cheap, public-source) and Layer 2 pmf-signal (the unique deliverable: claim ledger × verdict matrix from N=15–200 grounded persona simulation, plus warm-path outreach). Standalone customer-debrief synthesizes real interview transcripts. Each skill produces a citation-backed markdown artifact under deals/<slug>/, optionally stitched into a final investment memo via the deprecated dudu:diligence wrapper.
defaultPrompt: I'm evaluating a new deal. Run dudu:background-check followed by dudu:pmf-signal on it.
Run dudu:founder-check on the founders of this company.
